commit_scope: Spec for Form intrinsic casting: every primitive type movement (bool/int/float/string) becomes an explicit content-addressed CAST recipe with nothing-on-failure semantics, reversibility declared as data, dialect coercion tables consulted by lifters, and a Form-native static cast-check walk — both lanes proven three-way. Spec-only slice; the idea is recorded in the pipeline.

local_validation.summary: Spec quality gate passes. INDEX regenerated so the spec lands with its edges in the same commit. The spec grounds R3 in observed kernel drift: str_to_int discards the parse error and returns 0 (form/form-kernel-go/main.go:2142, same shape in Rust/TS) — the cast surface makes failure the core-axioms third state (nothing) instead. Design lanes settled in conversation: runtime casts are ordinary recipes on the value-walk; static cast-checking is a resolution walk over Blueprint coordinates; both Form-native from the start.

known_limitations.limitation: Spec only — intrinsic-cast.fk, the two bands, and ontology CAST rows do not exist yet.
known_limitations.follow_up: Implementation slice per the spec's Task Card; first movement is typed-token interning check named in Risks.

ci_validation.summary: Docs/spec-only change; spec quality gate runs in CI.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No runtime behavior change. The body gains the named destination for primitive casting so the TS/Python BMF lifters' string/float/bool gap closes along one path instead of per-dialect workarounds.
test_flows: Idea recorded via public POST /api/ideas (python fallback header) and returned id c3c5d99d-dc66-44b4-8fd9-915ededbf4c9.
e2e_validation.summary: Spec validated locally; idea persisted through the public door.

phase_gate.gate: Spec drafted, validated, and edged (INDEX + idea record)
phase_gate.next: Implement the cast surface and both proof bands per the Task Card
